productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Casual Sandals
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these Nu-buck sandals from lee cooper are a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Upper Soft, wide straps made from nu-buck with a toe separator to hold the foot in place Perforations on the straps for breathable comfort Stitch detailing on the straps and foot-bed for style and durability Soft and ergonomically padded foot-bed for all-day comfort and style Out-sole Textured PU out-sole with multi-directional grooves for absolute grip shoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
